caption: The video appears to be a news segment covering a political event, likely in India, given the Hindi text and the style of clothing worn by the individuals. The scene shows a group of people walking outdoors, with some dressed in formal attire, including suits and traditional Indian garments. The individuals seem to be part of an official procession or meeting, as they are being escorted by security personnel. The text on the screen mentions "Congress Chhappati," suggesting a discussion or issue related to the Congress party. The names "Nitesh Kumar" and "Sumit Kumar" are highlighted, indicating their significance in the context of the news story. The overall atmosphere suggests a formal and possibly high-profile political gathering.
